name: node-events
title: node-events
summary: Node.js events module to embed by web packers
description:
Node.js events module to embed by web packers
"events" implements the Node.js events module for environments that do not
have it, like browsers.
.
This module is used by web packers.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-events because Node.js events module to embed by web packers.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-events as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-events with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-events --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
